characters.name: Javier Acosta
characters.description: Javier AcostaBiographyStatusDeceasedEnemiesSimone TaylorWalter O'BrienEpisode InfoSeason(s)1First episodeRevengeLast episodeRevengeActor InfoActor/ActressChristian Ochoa Javier Acostawas the leader of the 'Ghosts', a team who broke into safes and left behind IEDs. During a job, AgentSimone Taylorand her partner were tailing him, and he and his crew sprayed her partner with bullets and paralyzed him.

characters.name: Ada
characters.description: Ada PearceBiographyAge18StatusAliveFamilyDavid Pearce (father)Unnamed † (mother)FriendsHappy QuinnToby CurtisOccupationStudentEpisode InfoSeason(s)3First episodeDon't Burst My BubbleLast episodeDon't Burst My BubbleActor InfoActor/ActressMary Mouser Toby Curtis Adais a friend ofHappy'swho, due to her compromised immune system, must live in a sterilized bubble. Despite her difficult situation due to her weakened immune system, Ada has shown amazing emotional strength and focus during perilous moments. Her sound knowledge of physics and mechanics allows her to converse with and understand genius-level intellectuals such as Happy Quinn.

characters.name: Tim Armstrong
characters.description: Timothy ArmstrongBiographyStatusAliveFamilyUnnamed †(father)RelationshipsPaige Dineen(ex-girlfriend)EnemiesWalter O'BrienOccupationUS Navy Seal(honorably discharged)Scorpion(formerly)Head of securityEpisode InfoSeason(s)2·3First episodeDjibouti CallLast episodeWreck the HallsActor InfoActor/ActressScott Porter Timothy Armstrongis a U.S. Navy SEAL and former member of Team Scorpion. Tim is a leader. When he was young, Tim was a bully.  However, he later realized he was wrong and decided he wanted to help people and joined the navy. He is displayed in Scorpion as a friendly person who tries to get along with other members though struggles with doing so. He does however eventually win them over and most of the team end up liking him. He has a leading personality but always tries to help wherever he can. Tim is a leader. characters.name: Rebecca Burns
characters.description: Rebecca BurnsBiographyStatusAliveFamilyAmanda Gallo† (daughter)Mr. Burns (husband)Joanna Burns(daughter)RelationshipsCabe Gallo(ex-husband)FriendsCabe GalloWalter O'BrienOccupationCounselEpisode InfoSeason(s)1First episodeRogue ElementActor InfoActor/ActressJessica Tuck Rebecca Burns, formerlyGallo,is the ex-wife ofCabe Gallo, and the mother of their deceased daughterAmanda. She later remarried and hadanother daughterwith her second husband. At some point in time, Rebecca and Cabe got married, and during their marriage created a code to use if they were ever in trouble. They eventually had a daughter, Amanda, who died, and Cabe divorced Rebecca. They did not have contact for the next fifteen years. TBA

characters.name: Mark Collins
characters.description: Mark CollinsBiographyStatusAliveFamilyUnnamed (mother)Unnamed † (uncle)EnemiesTim ArmstrongWalter O'Brien(ex-friend)Toby Quinn-Curtis(ex-teammate)Sylvester Dodd(ex-teammate)Happy Quinn-Curtis(ex-teammate)OccupationScorpion Member(formerly)Episode InfoSeason(s)1,2,3,4First episodePlutonium Is ForeverLast episodeMore ExtinctionActor InfoActor/ActressJoshua Leonard Unnamed † (uncle) Mark Collinsis a radio expert and former member ofTeam Scorpion. He "went down the rabbit hole," meaning that he fell away from their everyday life, and got completely lost in his mind. Walter had him incarcerated in a mental asylum, but after Mark abducted Toby, he was sent to prison. In "More Extinction" he escapes as helping Scorpion stop an extinction-level event. Throughout season 4, Cabe faces possible jail time for Collins escape but is ultimately acquitted thanks to Sly. Mark was portrayed byJoshua Leonard. Mark is very troubled person, and a master mental manipulator, able to make even Scorpion doubt both each other and themselves. In addition to this, he's insane, unstable, and has few morals, as seen when he was willing to kidnap and kill Toby, yet he didn't torture him, but instead made it sound like he was. He's extraordinarily emotional, as he waited for years to get revenge on Walter for locking him away in an insane asylum, he was even willing to let a nuclear reactor meltdown to get his revenge. However, after being locked up for the second time, Mark seems to have calmed down a little, only targeting Scorpion as opposed to endangering unrelated parties, like all the people who would have been killed by the nuclear blast that he was previously okay with killing. Mark has little but contempt for Walter because Walter is trying to become more human, and is obssessed with proving he is smarter than him, yet curiously expressed sincere regret and disappointment when Walter ultimately decided to let him go and save Toby, choosing humanity over logic.

characters.name: Paige Dineen
characters.description: Paige DineenAdultChildBiographyAge34StatusAliveFamilyMr. Dineen † (father)Veronica Dineen(mother)Ralph Dineen(son)RelationshipsWalter O'Brien(ex-boyfriend)Drew Baker(ex-boyfriend, father of Ralph)Tim Armstrong(ex-boyfriend)FriendsWalter O'Brien(Ex-Friend)Sylvester Dodd(Friend)Toby Quinn-Curtis(Friend)OccupationScorpion Liaison  (formerly)Office Manager at Elia's Company (formerly)Waitress (formerly)Team Centipede Member (current)Episode InfoSeason(s)1·2·3·4First episodePilotLast episodeA Lie in the SandMcPhee - American Idol CelebrityActor/ActressKatharine McPheeSamantha Sonnett(young) Samantha Sonnett(young) Paige Violet Dineenis a member of Team Scorpion with the role of social handler. She is a daughter ofVeronica Dineenand her deceased spouse, Mr. Dineen, and a single mother toRalph Dineen. Paige possesses a remarkable kindness and caring nature that radiates through her interactions with others. Not only is she a devoted mother to her son, Ralph, but she also assumes the role of a nurturing figure within the team, earning the title of the team's "mother." Paige takes it upon herself to ensure the well-being of her teammates, going above and beyond to make sure they eat, socialize, and find moments of joy amidst their intense work. Despite not possessing the same intellectual capabilities as her genius counterparts, Paige seamlessly integrates into various situations and proves her value time and again. Within Team Scorpion, Paige's unique perspective and humanitarian knowledge offer a fresh and essential dimension. She brings a wealth of practical knowledge and empathy to the table, often providing invaluable solutions that the other team members may overlook. Paige's ability to bridge the gap between the logical thinking of the geniuses and the human element of the challenges they face is truly remarkable. Her presence helps maintain a balance and reminds everyone of the importance of human connection and understanding amidst their intense problem-solving endeavors. Paige's inherent compassion and warmth shine through in her interactions with others. She embraces her humanity and encourages those around her to do the same. Her genuine desire to help and uplift others is a driving force in her life. Paige finds fulfillment in extending a helping hand, offering support, and fostering a sense of community. Her ability to empathize and connect with people on an emotional level is a testament to her nurturing and caring nature. In addition to her role as a mother and a crucial member of Team Scorpion, Paige exhibits an unwavering ability to stay focused and composed under pressure. She possesses a level-headedness that not only benefits her personally but also serves as a grounding force for her teammates. During intense missions or critical situations, Paige's presence helps to keep everyone focused, enabling them to perform at their best. Her ability to maintain clarity and guide her teammates through challenging circumstances is a testament t

characters.name: Cabe Gallo
characters.description: Cabe GalloBiographyAge59-60StatusAliveFamilyUnnamed † (grandfather)Amanda Gallo† (daughter)RelationshipsRebecca Burns(ex-wife)Walter O'Brien(surrogate son)Happy Quinn(surrogate daughter)Ralph Dineen(surrogate grandson)Allie Jones(girlfriend)FriendsHappy Quinn-CurtisWalter O'BrienSylvester DoddToby Quinn-CurtisPaige DineenRalph DineenAllie JonesRebecca BurnsEnemiesMark CollinsMerrickMick(Ex-friend)OccupationUS Marine Corps Colonel (formerly)FBI Special Agent (formerly)Campaign Manager (formerly)DHS Supervisory Special AgentScorpion HandlerFriendEpisode InfoSeason(s)1·2·3·4First episodePilotLast episodeA Lie in the SandActor InfoActor/ActressRobert Patrick MerrickMick(Ex-friend) FBI Special Agent (formerly)Campaign Manager (formerly)DHS Supervisory Special AgentScorpion HandlerFriend Cabe is a very out-going man who seeks to help those he loves, and seems to have a lot of trust in those people. In the show, Cabe shows this trust to his surrogate sonWalter, who he had difficulties with in the past. Walter even states this level of trust near the end of season 3, stating that out of all the crew, Cabe trusts Walter most. Cabe is a very forgiving person given the circumstances of Walter in the past, but whenAllie, his latest ex-girlfriend betrays a member of the team,Sylvester, by posting humiliating videos of him under the instruction of her boss, Cabe cannot forgive and ends the relationship, where at this moment Cabe seems relatively upset.

characters.name: Heywood Jahelpme Morris
characters.description: Heywood Jahelpme MorrisBiographical InformationFull NameHeywood Jahelpme MorrisGenderMaleEye colorBrownHair colorBrownStatusAliveOccupationLawyerRelationshipsFriendsWalter O'BrienSylvester DoddRalph DineenAppearancesSeason(s)2First episodeTickerLast episodeChernobyl IntentionsActor/ActressHoratio SanzHeywood is a lawyer thatWaltermeets in the emergency room after being in a car accident in the season two episodeTicker. He later on becomesSly's personal lawyer and the lawyer that representsRalphwhen his code is stolen. His case with Ralph is the first he ever won.

Allie was portrayed byReiko Aylesworth. She released a deceptive ad in order to keep her job and this causes Cabe to break up with her.

characters.name: Linda
characters.description: LindaBiographyStatusAliveRelationshipsDatedWalter O'BrienOccupationEvent CoordinatorEpisode InfoSeason(s)2First episodeSun of a GunLast episodeHard KnoxActor InfoActor/ActressBrooke Nevin Lindais a recurring character who appears in multiple episodes of Season Two of the show. She first appears in "Sun of a Gun", as the head matchmaker in a speed dating service thatWalterandCabedecide to go attend in an attempt by Walter to try to connect emotionally with others. The speed dating goes badly, but Walter manages to get one date with her. In "Da Bomb", after a failed date with Walter, she walks into the team's garage and demands to see Walter, handing him a thumb drive. On the drive is a recording of a scrambled voice which tells them that they need to sabotage their current mission, a NASA rocket launch, or else face the consequences. Linda then opens her coat and shows the team that she has a bomb strapped to her chest. The team decide that they can not save the Rocket launch and stop Linda from being killed by the bomb.

characters.name: Megan O'Brien-Dodd
characters.description: Megan O'Brien-DoddBiographyAge35-36 (died 2015)StatusDeceased(Due to Multiple Sclerosis)FamilyPatrick O'Brien † (paternal grandfather)Sean O'Brien(father)Louise O'Brien(mother)Tobin(maternal uncle)Walter O'Brien(brother)Sylvester Dodd(husband)Kenneth Dodd(father-in-law)RelationshipsSylvester Dodd(Husband)Episode InfoSeason(s)1·2First episodeSingle Point of FailureLast episodeArrivals and DeparturesActor InfoActor/ActressCamille GuatyEmily Robinson(young)  Megan O'Brien-Doddwas the daughter ofSeanandLouise O'Brien, the niece ofTobin, the older sister ofWalter O'Brien, and the wife ofSylvester Dodd. She was hospitalized due to multiple sclerosis (MS). The MS affected her nervous system, causing immobility and eventually respiratory failure, as the nerves that run the respiratory system were severely damaged and unable to keep her lungs going. Megan is the opposite of heryounger brother, she is very light hearted and loves to have fun, wanting to enjoy every second of her life especially since she knows she has limited time. However, she is serious when she needs to be, and is much more understanding of people and comforting. She cares for her friends and family, and is especially protective of her brother.

characters.name: Nemos
characters.description: NemosBiographyStatusAliveFriendsPaigeOccupationDiner OwnerEpisode InfoSeason(s)1First episodePilotLast episodeSatellite of Love(dream)Actor InfoActor/ActressAnthony Skordi Nemosis the owner of a diner and the former boss ofPaige Dineen. Nemos had a sign for 'Help Wanted', and Paige Dineen and her son came in. She bought her son an ice cream and interviewed the job. She got it, and convinced Nemos to give her an advance.

characters.name: Louise O'Brien
characters.description: Louise O'BrienBiographyStatusAliveFamilySean O'Brien(husband)Tobin(brother)Megan O'Brien-Dodd†(daughter)Walter O'Brien(son)Patrick O'Brien †(father-in-law)Sylvester Dodd(son-in-law)FriendsSylvester DoddPaige DineenOccupationFarmer/HousewifeEpisode InfoSeason(s)1,2,3First episodePilotActor InfoActor/ActressPamela ShaferCarla Toutz Louise O'Brienis the younger sister ofTobin, the wife ofSean O'Brienand the mother ofWalter O'Brienand the lateMegan O'Brien-Dodd. At some point in her life, she married Sean O'Brien and had two children: a daughter, Megan, and a few years later a son, Walter, in 1982. Her daughter was often sick due to her MS, and at age sixteen her son left home and did not see his parents for fifteen years. TBA

characters.name: Sean O'Brien
characters.description: Sean O'BrienBiographyStatusAliveFamilyPatrick O'Brien † (father)Louise O'Brien†  (wife)Tobin(brother-in-law)Megan O'Brien-Dodd† (daughter)Walter O'Brien(son)RelationshipsSylvester Dodd(Friend)OccupationFarmerEpisode InfoSeason(s)1·2·3First episodePilotLast episodeSly and the Family StoneActor InfoActor/ActressGlenn Keogh Sean O'Brienis the son of Patrick O'Brien, the husband ofLouise O'Brien, the brother-in-law ofTobin, and the father ofMegan O'Brien-DoddandWalter O'Brien. He is a farmer in Ireland. Sean, at some point in time, married Louise and had two children: a daughter, Megan, and a few years later a son, Walter in 1982. He and his son weren't close, and Walter left home when he was sixteen and did not see his parents for fifteen years.
